workflow.name: Curate and send weekly AI newsletters with Tavily, Gemini, and Gmail
workflow.description:
## What this workflow does

  Automatically curates and sends a weekly newsletter by combining your internal blog posts with external news. The workflow researches your topic using Tavily, has Gemini write professional newsletter content, and delivers a beautifully formatted HTML email via Gmail.

  ## How it works

  1. **Weekly Trigger** - Runs on a configurable schedule (default: every 7 days at 9:30 AM)
  2. **Dual Research** - Tavily searches your company blog for internal updates AND external sources for market news in parallel
  3. **AI Writing** - Gemini generates a complete newsletter with warm intro, product updates section, and curated news
  4. **Email Assembly** - Merges AI content with a professional HTML template
  5. **Delivery** - Gmail sends the formatted newsletter to your subscribers

  ## Setup steps

  1. Open the **Set newsletter config** node to customize:
     - Topic (what Tavily searches for)
     - Newsletter name, author, email title
     - Logo URL, blog URL, subscribe URL
  2. Add your **Tavily API** credentials (get a key at tavily.com)
  3. Add your **Google Gemini API** credentials
  4. Add your **Gmail OAuth** credentials
  5. Update the recipient email in the **Send newsletter** node
  6. Test with manual execution before enabling the schedule

  ## API keys required

  | Service | Purpose | Cost |
  |---------|---------|------|
  | Tavily | Web search for blog + news | Free tier available |
  | Google Gemini | Newsletter writing | Free tier available |
  | Gmail | Email delivery | Free |

workflow.name: Curate and send AI newsletters with Tavily and Gemini

assignments.name: header_internal
assignments.value: New this Week from AI Sales Agent HQ

parameters.text:
=Raw Search Data: {{ JSON.stringify($('Aggregate all articles').first().json.research_data) }}

Task: I have provided a list of search results.

Identify Internal Updates: Look for results from the domain {{ $('Set newsletter config').item.json.company_blog_url }}. Summarize these into the product_section JSON field.

Identify Market News: Look for all other results (NOT from that domain). Summarize these into the news_section JSON field."

options.systemMessage:
=You are the editor of '{{ $('Set newsletter config').item.json.newsletter_name }}'. You write in a professional, narrative style. **Output Format:** Return a SINGLE valid JSON object. Do not wrap in markdown. **1. intro_text** A warm, 2-paragraph introduction. Wrap each paragraph in

tags. **2. product_section** A HTML string containing your internal updates. - Start with the header:

{{ $('Set newsletter config').item.json.header_internal }}

- If internal updates are found, format them as a numbered list:

1. [Product Name]

[Description]

Why it matters: [Benefit]

- If NO internal updates are found, return an empty string "". **3. news_section** A HTML string containing market news. - Start with the header:

{{ $('Set newsletter config').item.json.header_external }}

- List 3-4 key stories using a clean unordered list:
  • [Headline]: [Summary].

parameters.query: =site:{{ $('Set newsletter config').item.json.company_blog_url }} "news" OR "update" OR "launch" OR "release" OR "template" OR "New"

parameters.content:
## How it works
This workflow automatically curates and sends a weekly AI newsletter by combining internal blog posts with external news.

1. **Trigger** - Runs weekly on a schedule (configurable)
2. **Research** - Tavily searches your company blog and external news for your topic
3. **AI Writing** - Gemini generates a professional newsletter with intro, internal updates, and market news
4. **Send** - Gmail delivers the formatted HTML email to your subscribers

## Setup steps
1. Open **Set newsletter config** node to customize: topic, newsletter name, logo URL, blog URL
2. Add your **Tavily API** credentials (get key at tavily.com)
3. Add your **Google Gemini API** credentials
4. Add your **Gmail OAuth** credentials
5. Update the recipient email in **Send newsletter** node
6. Test with manual execution before enabling the schedule

**Research Phase**
Searches your blog and external news sources in parallel using Tavily

**AI Generation**
Gemini writes the newsletter content in structured HTML format

**Email Output**
Merges AI content with HTML template and sends via Gmail
